debug_info.goal:
w : Nat
x y : BitVec w
⊢ (x = y) = (BitVec.beq w x y = true)

failed_attempts:
apply propext
  constructor
  · rintro rfl
    unfold beq
    generalize w - 1 = k
    induction k <;> simp [beq.go, *]
  · intro h
    apply eq_of_getLsbD_eq
    intro i hi
    have : ∀ k, beq.go w x y k → ∀ j ≤ k, x.getLsbD (w - 1 - j) = y.getLsbD (w - 1 - j) := by
      intro k hk j hj
      induction k with
      | zero => simp [beq.go] at hk; simp at hj; subst hj; exact hk
      | succ k ih => simp [beq.go, Bool.and_eq_true] at hk; rcases hj with rfl | hj; exact hk.1; exact ih hk.2 hj
    specialize this (w - 1) h (w - 1 - i) (Nat.le_sub_of_add_le (Nat.succ_le_of_lt hi))
    rwa [Nat.sub_sub_self (Nat.le_sub_of_add_le (Nat.succ_le_of_lt hi))] at this
